{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sunken Tower
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sunken Tower]] has thirty floors containing many facilities and pocket worlds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sunken Tower]] contains a [[construct]] in charge of it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Set the evacuation alarm,” Northstrider commanded the construct in charge of the Sunken Tower.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
